name: bge-large-en-v1.5
description: BAAI's bge-en-large-v1.5 for embedding text sequences

batch_size.description: Batch size to use when processing text data.
batch_size.title: Batch Size

convert_to_numpy.description: When true, return output as npy file. By default, we return JSON
convert_to_numpy.title: Convert To Numpy

path.description: Path to file containing text as JSONL with 'text' field or valid JSON string list.
path.title: Path

texts.description: text to embed, formatted as JSON list of strings (e.g. ["hello", "world"])
texts.title: Texts
